title: Phase 1 spec: permission system (hooks/toolPermission + utils/permissions + components/permissions) [CC parity]
description:
## Goal

Extract a behavioral spec for this subsystem by reading Claude Code's TypeScript source. **Output**: update this issue body with a markdown spec pinning down each testable contract (input → expected output, edge cases, error paths). No Rust yet — that is Phase 2.

Parent audit: #523.

## Claude Code source — read these

- `hooks/toolPermission/handlers/interactiveHandler.ts` (~536 lines)
- `hooks/toolPermission/handlers/swarmWorkerHandler.ts` (~159 lines)
- `hooks/toolPermission/handlers/coordinatorHandler.ts` (~65 lines)
- `hooks/toolPermission/PermissionContext.ts` (~388 lines)
- `utils/permissions/shellRuleMatching.ts` (~228 lines)
- `utils/permissions/PermissionMode.ts` (~141 lines)
- `utils/permissions/autoModeState.ts` (~39 lines) — classifier-based auto-allow

## OpenClaudia counterpart

- `src/permissions.rs` (~664 lines) — check order comment at line 8, glob warn at 90-92, manager at 131
- `src/config/permissions.rs` (~17 lines)
- `src/coordinator/permission.rs` (~177 lines) — Phase 1 stub

## Behaviors to specify

For each, capture: input shape, expected output, error paths, side effects, and at least one edge case.

1. Check order: `AlwaysAllow` persisted rules fire before session rules before `default_allow` globs
2. Invalid glob pattern in `default_allow` logs warning and is skipped (no panic)
3. `PermissionManager::unrestricted()` bypasses all checks (used in headless mode)
4. `LeaderPermissionBridge` queues prompts from teammates to leader session
5. Tool call denied interactively is recorded in denial tracking (repeat call → auto-deny)
6. Bash command matching against shell-rule glob: `git *` matches `git status` but not `gita`
7. Empty default_allow falls back to deny-by-default (or whatever OC's actual default is — document it)

## Gaps already visible from the brief

These are CC features OpenClaudia does not implement. Do **not** include them in the spec — file each as a separate feature/refactor issue and link back here.

- **Three-handler runtime dispatch missing** — file: "Split permission handler by runtime context (interactive / swarm-worker / coordinator) per CC"
- **Auto-mode classifier missing** — file: "Add classifier-based auto-allow mode (parity with CC `autoModeState.ts`)"

## Done when

- This issue body has been edited to contain a markdown spec, one section per behavior above
- Each behavior section names the function(s) on both sides (or marks the OC side missing)
- Every gap above has been filed as its own issue and linked here
- The matching Phase 2 issue is unblocked
